content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Cd and pwd commands". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/158/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of commands. Then follow n lines, each containing a command. The command can be either 'cd x' where x is a directory, or 'pwd' to print the current directory.
content.outputFormat: For each 'pwd' command, print the current directory.

hidden.label: max boundary
hidden.input:
9
cd a
cd b
cd c
cd d
cd e
cd f
cd g
cd h
cd i

hidden.label: uniform/edge cases
hidden.input:
5
cd a
cd b
cd c
cd ..
pwd

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed
general mixed case
hidden.input:
7
cd a
cd b
cd c
cd ..
pwd
cd d
cd e

solution.approach: Use a stack to keep track of the current directory path. When a 'cd' command is encountered, push the directory onto the stack if it's not '..', otherwise pop the last directory from the stack. When a 'pwd' command is encountered, print the current directory path by joining all directories in the stack with '/'
